variants.title: HiFi Filter OS 5136 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO58450
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OS 5136 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO58450
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OS 5136 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO58450. Easy to install and replace, the OS 5136 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR/OIL SEPARATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 350.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 274.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 210.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 618.0 mm
